testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_help_flag
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --help Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- usage: acs_info.py [-h] [--acs_config_path ACS_CONFIG_PATH] [--system_config_path SYSTEM_CONFIG_PATH] [--uefi_version_log UEFI_VERSION_LOG] [--dmidecode_log DMIDECODE_LOG] [--output_dir OUTPUT_DIR] [--ipmitool_log IPMITOOL_LOG]
Collect ACS-like system info & summary data, then write to acs_info.txt & acs_info.json.
options: -h, --help show this help message and exit --acs_config_path ACS_CONFIG_PATH Path to acs_config.txt (Band, version info, etc.) --system_config_path SYSTEM_CONFIG_PATH Path to system_config.txt (extra system fields) --uefi_version_log UEFI_VERSION_LOG Path to uefi_version.log (UTF-16 or text) --dmidecode_log DMIDECODE_LOG Path to dmidecode log --output_dir OUTPUT_DIR Directory where acs_info.txt and acs_info.json will be created. --ipmitool_log IPMITOOL_LOG Path to ipmitool mc info log for BMC firmware extraction --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/dmidecode.log --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check exists: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/out/acs_info.json -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/out/acs_info.json contains '"Vendor": "VendorA"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/out/acs_info.json contains '"System Name": "BoardA"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/out/acs_info.json contains '"SoC Family": "FamilyA"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/4_cli_generates_json_from_dmidecode_only/out/acs_info.json contains '"Firmware Version": "FW-1.2.3"' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_merges_acs_and_system_config
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/dmidecode.log --acs_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/acs_config.txt --system_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/system_config.txt --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- [1;93mWARNING: ipmitool log path not provided for BMC firmware extraction.[0m --- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/out/acs_info.json contains '"ACS version": "6.1"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/out/acs_info.json contains '"Board Revision": "RevC"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/5_cli_merges_acs_and_system_config/out/acs_info.json contains '"Band": "SystemReady Band"' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_stops_parsing_at_user_defined_configs_marker
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/6_cli_stops_parsing_at_user_defined_configs_marker/dmidecode.log --acs_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/6_cli_stops_parsing_at_user_defined_configs_marker/acs_config.txt --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/6_cli_stops_parsing_at_user_defined_configs_marker/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- [1;93mWARNING: ipmitool log path not provided for BMC firmware extraction.[0m --- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/6_cli_stops_parsing_at_user_defined_configs_marker/out/acs_info.json contains '"ACS version": "7.0"' -> PASS post_check file_not_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/6_cli_stops_parsing_at_user_defined_configs_marker/out/acs_info.json contains 'should_not_appear' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_reads_utf16_uefi_version
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/7_cli_reads_utf16_uefi_version/dmidecode.log --uefi_version_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/7_cli_reads_utf16_uefi_version/uefi_version.log --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/7_cli_reads_utf16_uefi_version/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/7_cli_reads_utf16_uefi_version/out/acs_info.json contains '"UEFI Version": "UEFI v2.9"' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_adds_bmc_firmware_only_for_systemready_band
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/8_cli_adds_bmc_firmware_only_for_systemready_band/dmidecode.log --acs_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/8_cli_adds_bmc_firmware_only_for_systemready_band/acs_config.txt --ipmitool_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/8_cli_adds_bmc_firmware_only_for_systemready_band/ipmitool.log --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/8_cli_adds_bmc_firmware_only_for_systemready_band/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/8_cli_adds_bmc_firmware_only_for_systemready_band/out/acs_info.json contains '"BMC Firmware Version": "1.45"' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_does_not_add_bmc_firmware_for_non_systemready_band
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/9_cli_does_not_add_bmc_firmware_for_non_systemready_band/dmidecode.log --acs_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/9_cli_does_not_add_bmc_firmware_for_non_systemready_band/acs_config.txt --ipmitool_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/9_cli_does_not_add_bmc_firmware_for_non_systemready_band/ipmitool.log --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/9_cli_does_not_add_bmc_firmware_for_non_systemready_band/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_not_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/9_cli_does_not_add_bmc_firmware_for_non_systemready_band/out/acs_info.json contains '"BMC Firmware Version"' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_uses_first_dmidecode_values_not_later_duplicates
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/10_cli_uses_first_dmidecode_values_not_later_duplicates/dmidecode.log --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/10_cli_uses_first_dmidecode_values_not_later_duplicates/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/10_cli_uses_first_dmidecode_values_not_later_duplicates/out/acs_info.json contains '"Vendor": "VendorFirst"' -> PASS post_check file_not_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/10_cli_uses_first_dmidecode_values_not_later_duplicates/out/acs_info.json contains 'VendorSecond' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_systemready_band_is_case_and_space_insensitive
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/11_cli_systemready_band_is_case_and_space_insensitive/dmidecode.log --acs_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/11_cli_systemready_band_is_case_and_space_insensitive/acs_config.txt --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/11_cli_systemready_band_is_case_and_space_insensitive/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- [1;93mWARNING: ipmitool log path not provided for BMC firmware extraction.[0m --- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/11_cli_systemready_band_is_case_and_space_insensitive/out/acs_info.json contains '"BMC Firmware Version": "Unknown"' -> PASS

testcase.name: acs_info::acs_info.py::cli_config_value_with_extra_colon_is_preserved
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/acs_info.py suite=acs_info phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/acs_info.py --dmidecode_log /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/12_cli_config_value_with_extra_colon_is_preserved/dmidecode.log --system_config_path /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/12_cli_config_value_with_extra_colon_is_preserved/system_config.txt --output_dir /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/acs_info/acs_info/12_cli_config_value_with_extra_colon_is_preserved/out Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR ---
